_comment: Registry of every feature flag this repo recognises. The dead-flag
detector (scripts/detect-dead-flags.ts) reads this file and the call
- declared-but-unused flags (dead — delete the entry + the branch)
- used-but-undeclared flags (forgot to register a new flag)
Add a new flag here in the same PR that introduces the call site.
Remove the entry in the same PR that removes the call site.
name        lowercase snake_case, matches the string passed to
envVar      derived: FF_<NAME>  (or FF_<NAME>_PCT for rollout flags).
owner       GitHub login or team handle responsible for cleanup.
createdAt   ISO-8601 date the flag was introduced.
maxAgeDays  Optional override (defaults to 90 in the detector).
cleanup     Free-form note describing what 'done' looks like.
